title: Visionary Art
scenario: Design a visually striking logo for a new art studio specializing in 3D sculptures. The logo should incorporate elements that reflect the studio's focus on 3D art. It should be designed to work well in both color and grayscale formats. The logo should be scalable to various sizes and resolutions.
constraints: Must be designed using vector graphics
Must be scalable to at least 100x100 pixels

evaluationCriteria.description: The logo should demonstrate a high level of creativity and artistic merit.
The logo should remain visually appealing when resized to 100x100 pixels.
The logo should be designed using vector graphics and meet the scalability constraint.
